headline: Polygon Axes Staff After $170M Coinme Deal

article.title: Polygon CEO announces job cuts amid Coinme acquisition
article.summary: The round of layoffs was part of Polygon transitioning operations to payments following a $250 million deal to acquire Coinme and Sequence in January.

headline: Trump Insider Nets $100K on Kalshi Crypto Bets

article.title: Trump teleprompter operator made $100K betting on Kalshi markets tied to speeches: ABC
article.summary: According to ABC News, federal regulators are investigating whether the longtime White House staffer used nonpublic information to profit from event contracts tied to President Donald Trump’s speeches.

headline: Intuitive Surgical Plunges 8% on Slowing Growth Prospects

article.title: Intuitive Surgical Drops as ACA Changes, GLP-1s Weigh on Growth
article.summary: Intuitive Surgical shares fell as much as 13% in after-market trading as growth in use of its da Vinci surgical robots slowed to the weakest pace in four years and its guidance for procedure growth was unchanged.

headline: Aussie Banks Surge 8% Against $1B Short Trade

article.title: Bank Rally Hits Short Sellers Betting on Australia Lending Slump
article.summary: The upward march in share prices of Australia’s biggest banks is reversing the tumble sparked two months ago by property tax changes, and inflicting pain on short sellers who were anticipating a prolonged plunge.

headline: Suno Injects 1000s Hours Data Into AI Platform

article.summary: Source code leaked reveals how substantial portions of Suno’s training library were assembled.

headline: Morgan Stanley Adds 3 Cryptos to E*Trade Platform Today

article.summary: Eligible customers can now buy, sell, and hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with Morgan Stanley via Zero Hash.

headline: MegaETH Cuts 80% of Mafia Accelerator Programs Overnight

article.title: MegaETH sunsets Mega Mafia accelerator program, noting ‘most’ of its successful apps left
article.summary: MegaETH did not take equity or governance positions in the approximately 20 projects incubated in the Mega Mafia.

headline: Bitcoin Holds $20k Amid JPMorgan Cash Boost

article.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin outlook sees ‘encouraging sign’ as Strategy boosts cash reserves
article.summary: Strategy's larger cash reserves and improving institutional demand in bitcoin futures are "encouraging signs" for bitcoin, JPMorgan said.

headline: US Chip Stocks Plummet 5% Amid Market Turmoil

article.title: US chip and memory stocks slide in fresh bout of Wall Street tumult
article.summary: Investors pull away from shares in companies that have led markets higher this year
